data.title: 国际服活动复刻「Summer Sky's Wishlist」
data.summary: [Event Update Notice] The students pack up and head to the beach to gather everything on their wish
data.body:
[Event Update Notice]

The students pack up and head to the beach to gather everything on their wish list!

Schedule: 11/22 (Tue) 2:00 AM–11/29 (Tue) 1:59 AM (UTC)
